serverInfo.name: catalunya-2022
serverInfo.title: Catalunya 2022 - RESET: Crida per reactivar el país

description: Full-text access to «Catalunya 2022 - RESET: Crida per reactivar el país», the strategic policy document with 3 spheres, 12 goals, and 91 actions authored by 30 Catalan civil-society experts. Provides document search, section retrieval, proposal listings, and contributor profiles in Catalan, English, and Spanish. No authentication required.
